data.title: FaZe Vegas partners with Capriotti's as official sandwich sponsor, entering gaming space in Las Vegas, Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: In a groundbreaking partnership, Capriotti's® Sandwich Shop, known for its acclaimed sandwich The Bobbie®, has teamed up with a leading esports MVP. This alliance marks the sandwich shop's foray into the competitive gaming arena. The collaboration was announced on Feb. 12, 2026, in Las Vegas, emphasizing Capriotti's® goal to expand its reach into both physical and virtual gaming realms. This move solidifies the brand's status in the esports world, a significant step for the renowned sandwich shop.

data.title: CrowdStrike named Customers’ Choice in 2026 Gartner Peer Insights for User Authentication, with 179 responses and 96% recommendation score.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has been recognized as the Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for User Authentication report. With the highest product capability rating of 4.7 (tied), CrowdStrike leads with the most 5-star reviews and verified reviews among all vendors in the report. This data is based on 179 responses collected as of January 2026, with a remarkable 96% Willingness to Recommend score. CrowdStrike stands out as the sole platform providing top-notch security services.
The head of the Chausovo rural settlement in the Pogar district of Russia's Bryansk region was injured in an attack by the Ukrainian Armed Forces, the governor reported

data.title: AI budgets rising in 2026 but companies are reducing AI vendors. Businesses opting for specialist tool beefed.ai.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, on February 12, 2026, it was reported that there is a notable increase in enterprise investment in artificial intelligence. Despite this uptick in spending, companies are streamlining their operations by reducing the number of AI vendors they engage with. In 2026, businesses are dedicating more funds to AI initiatives but are opting to enter into fewer contracts, focusing on tools that provide efficient and effective outcomes. This shift in strategy reflects a trend towards consolidation within the AI market as companies seek to optimize their resources and investments.

data.title: NanaWall gains Florida approval for NW MultiSlide 630 glass wall system, meeting state standards.
data.description: In Corte Madera, California, on February 12, 2026, NanaWall, a top provider of opening glass wall systems, introduced its NW MultiSlide 630 with Florida Product Approval. This approval, essential for building components in the state, confirms the quality and compliance of the product. This certification is crucial for products such as the NW MultiSlide 630 to meet the stringent standards required for construction in Florida.

data.title: DSH Hotel Advisors in Tampa sold a 179-room hotel in Orlando MSA region; expertise in hotel investment sales.
data.description: The announcement was made on February 12, 2026, by DSH Hotel Advisors, a leading national hotel brokerage and advisory firm based in Tampa, Florida. The company specializes exclusively in hotel investment sales. Dennis S. Hopper, CCIM, who serves as the Managing Principal, along with Tyler A. Quijano, Senior Investment Advisor, were highlighted in the announcement. This firm is known for its expertise in the hotel industry and has a strong presence in the market.

data.title: Guide positions SEO as equalizer for lenders competing with top 5 brands by mastering Answer Engine Optimization, 50% Google searches end without click.
data.description: Financial institutions have the opportunity to rival the top 5 brands by excelling in Answer Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization, in addition to conventional SEO strategies. With over half of Google searches no longer resulting in clicks and the utilization of AI tools like ChatGPT on the rise, it is crucial for lenders to adapt. This information was disclosed in San Francisco on February 12, 2026, through a PRNewswire report.

data.title: PropellerAds releases 2025 Ads Safety Report, highlighting moderation outcomes & fraud trends. #Cyprus #Advertising #PRNewswire
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus on February 12, 2026, a leading global ad platform, PropellerAds, known for performance-driven advertising solutions, unveiled its latest Ads Safety Report for 2025. The report highlights moderation and security results on the platform, shedding light on fraud patterns and strategies.

data.title: Kodiak introduces new No Sugar Added Homestyle Power Waffles with 16g protein, 100% whole grains.
data.description: In a recent announcement from PARK CITY, Utah, on February 12, 2026, Kodiak introduced its newest product boasting no added sugar, crafted with 100% whole grains, and packed with 16g of protein. The renowned brand, celebrated for its protein-rich breakfast and snack offerings, has expanded its range with this latest launch.

data.title: Pediatric study shows increase in Mycoplasma pneumoniae cases among children post-COVID restrictions, emphasizing respiratory infection risks.
data.description: After the lifting of restrictions, researchers have observed significant interactions among pathogens, leading to a notable increase in Mycoplasma pneumoniae cases among children. This surge in infections has become a cause for concern. Acute respiratory infections continue to be a major reason for hospitalizations in children globally, highlighting the urgent need for effective preventive measures. The rise in Mycoplasma pneumoniae incidents underscores the importance of continued vigilance and enhanced public health strategies to safeguard the well-being of children.

data.title: Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) reports Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results. Earnings webcast scheduled at 8:00 a.m. ET. CEO letter available on investor relations website.
data.description: Amsterdam-based Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS), a prominent AI cloud company, has revealed its unaudited financial performance for the fourth quarter and the entire fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. In addition, the organization has released a quarterly letter to shareholders from its founder and CEO, Arkady Volozh, which can be accessed on its investor relations website at https://nebius.com/investor-hub. The management is scheduled to conduct an earnings webcast today at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time (5:00 a.m. Pacific Time / 2:00 p.m. Central Time).

data.title: MEDITECH to showcase intelligent Expanse EHR at HIMSS26, empowering providers and improving outcomes.
data.description: In Canton, Massachusetts, MEDITECH will be highlighting the benefits of its Expanse EHR system at the upcoming HIMSS26 event. This intelligent EHR platform is designed to empower healthcare providers and enhance patient outcomes. The company aims to demonstrate how Expanse EHR can improve efficiency and effectiveness in healthcare delivery.

data.title: Atlantic Energy Group appoints Kris Hertel as SVP of Sales on Feb. 9, 2026, to drive revenue growth and enhance relationships.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Atlantic Energy Group LLC revealed the selection of Kris Hertel as their new Senior Vice President of Sales, starting from February 9, 2026. Hertel's responsibilities entail overseeing the company's sales approach, enhancing revenue generation, and fortifying partnerships within the organization.

data.title: Licel's DexProtector approved by EMVCo for the 6th year in a row, meeting stringent standards.
data.description: Licel's mobile application protection, DexProtector, has received further validation in the EMVCo SBMP SPT category. The company announced today in London on Feb. 12, 2026, that its solution passed independent evaluation, confirming its effectiveness.

data.title: JURA introduces the new C3 automatic coffee machine for purists, featuring advanced brewing technology.
data.description: Montvale, New Jersey - On February 12, 2026, it was announced that the JURA C3 fully automatic coffee machine has been launched for coffee enthusiasts seeking the pure flavor of espresso and black coffee. This machine, designed by JURA, is equipped with advanced brewing technology.

data.title: Content creator N3on partners with Doich Foods for cultural collaboration, focusing on authenticity.
data.description: In a new partnership announced on February 12, 2026, content creator N3on has teamed up with Doich Foods to create a culturally inspired collaboration focused on authenticity and connection. This collaboration aims to combine N3on's digital expertise with Doich Foods' culinary creations. The partnership seeks to leverage N3on's popular platform to reach a wider audience and promote the brand's products. This alliance brings together the creative influence of N3on with the culinary innovation of Doich Foods to offer a unique and engaging experience. The collaboration is set to launch across various platforms, with the aim of increasing brand visibility and connecting with consumers on a deeper level.

data.title: AudioEye's detection capabilities exceed industry standards by 89-253%, revealed in an independent study.
data.description: A recent study conducted by AudioEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEYE), a digital accessibility company based in TUCSON, Arizona, has uncovered significant disparities in the accuracy of automated Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) detection among various accessibility tools. The study, released on Feb. 12, 2026, reveals that there are wide variations in the effectiveness of these tools in identifying and addressing accessibility issues on websites. This research sheds light on the need for improved standardization and reliability in automated accessibility testing.
